keywords: MACHINE_LOCKED_KEYS compile-time constant set ORDER 1 rejection ConfigKeyImmutable OCC write-only engine-critical keys locked tenant configuration
teachingPoint: T606 TenantConfigurationManager MUST define MACHINE_LOCKED_KEYS as a compile-time const Set — never read from FREEDOM or database. The locked key check MUST run at ORDER 1, and on match MUST return DataProcessResult.failure + emit ConfigKeyImmutable without any storeDocument call. All config writes use OCC (optimistic concurrency control). There is no bypass path — locked key enforcement is absolute.
ironRules: MACHINE_LOCKED_KEYS defined as compile-time const Set at module scope — never runtime-configurable
Locked key check runs at ORDER 1 — storeDocument call never reached on locked key match
ConfigKeyImmutable emitted with rejectedKey before returning failure — silent ignore is prohibited
All config writes include { occ: true } — no OCC-less writes permitted
No superadmin bypass path exists for MACHINE_LOCKED_KEYS enforcement
